Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0023",
  "title": "韩国移动游戏收入TOP榜",
  "page_index": 26,
  "page_range": "26-27"
}

Section text:
韩国移动游戏收入TOP榜
新品占据收入榜单超半数历史罕见 单一品类爆发提前释放了玩家需求
来源：点点数据自主研究及绘制。
2025年韩国移动游戏收入TOP榜
韩国移动游戏收入榜呈现出一个历史罕见的现象：TOP10产品中超半数席位被新品占据，并且新品几乎清一色是MMORPG品类，同时多为韩国经典端游IP的改编或重启之作。同
一公司在一年内“祭出”多款同赛道下的重磅产品自我竞争，显然背后有不可撼动的力量在推动；但辩证的来看，新品能历史罕见的“清洗”收入榜单，也说明韩国移动游戏市场
仍充满了生命力与竞争力，来自中国游戏厂商乐牛游戏的《I9》跻身TOP10就是最好的印证之一。另一方面值得注意的是，对比往年榜单中放置、休闲、体育等多品类开花的局
面，2025年的韩国手游市场产品结构显著收缩。点点数据认为这种围绕MMORPG的结构收缩更像是一种过度消耗，其他细分品类或在未来两年反而有机会释放出更大市场潜力。

message.content:
This section provides a data-driven analysis of the 2025 South Korea mobile game revenue rankings, designed to answer queries on market performance, genre shifts, and top-performing titles. 
**Topics & Claims:** Addresses the historically rare dominance of new releases in the TOP 10 revenue list, noting they are predominantly MMORPGs adapted from classic Korean PC IPs. Claims that intra-company self-competition and new-title success reflect market vitality, while the sharp contraction of casual, idle, and sports genres indicates MMORPG market overconsumption, suggesting untapped potential for other categories over the next 1–2 years. Highlights the entry of Chinese developer Leniu Games’ *I9* into the TOP 10.
**Entities:** Lists top-grossing games (天堂M, 无尽冬日, Last War:Survival, 奥丁：神判, 洛奇M, 吸血鬼, 七骑士 Re:BIRTH, RF ONLINE NEXT, 枫之谷：放置冒险记, I9, 奔奔王国, 尤弥尔传奇, 不休旅途：绘卷世界, 缔造者:放逐之地) and publishers/developers (NCSOFT, 点点互动, First Fun, Kakao Games, NEXON, 网石游戏, 乐牛游戏, 娱美德, 4399, DRIMAGE).
**Dates:** Covers full-year 2025 revenue data; specifies new game launch months from January to October 2025.
**Tables & Metrics:** Features two structured tables: (1) 2025 Overall Revenue TOP 10 (rank, game name, publisher, annual revenue in 亿元, YoY growth rate); (2) 2025 New Release Revenue TOP 10 (rank, game name, publisher, annual revenue, overall rank, launch date). Key metrics include revenue figures, year-over-year growth/decline percentages, and ranking positions.
**Evidence Types:** Combines quantitative financial/ranking data with qualitative market trend analysis, attributed to 点点数据 (Diandian Data) proprietary research.
**Answerable Questions:** What were the top-grossing mobile games in South Korea in 2025? Which new releases and publishers led the revenue chart? How did MMORPGs perform compared to other genres? What are the exact annual revenue figures and YoY growth rates for top titles? When were the highest-earning new games launched? Which non-Korean/Chinese titles entered the TOP 10? What market trends explain the genre contraction and new-release dominance?

response_text:
This section provides a data-driven analysis of the 2025 South Korea mobile game revenue rankings, designed to answer queries on market performance, genre shifts, and top-performing titles. 
**Topics & Claims:** Addresses the historically rare dominance of new releases in the TOP 10 revenue list, noting they are predominantly MMORPGs adapted from classic Korean PC IPs. Claims that intra-company self-competition and new-title success reflect market vitality, while the sharp contraction of casual, idle, and sports genres indicates MMORPG market overconsumption, suggesting untapped potential for other categories over the next 1–2 years. Highlights the entry of Chinese developer Leniu Games’ *I9* into the TOP 10.
**Entities:** Lists top-grossing games (天堂M, 无尽冬日, Last War:Survival, 奥丁：神判, 洛奇M, 吸血鬼, 七骑士 Re:BIRTH, RF ONLINE NEXT, 枫之谷：放置冒险记, I9, 奔奔王国, 尤弥尔传奇, 不休旅途：绘卷世界, 缔造者:放逐之地) and publishers/developers (NCSOFT, 点点互动, First Fun, Kakao Games, NEXON, 网石游戏, 乐牛游戏, 娱美德, 4399, DRIMAGE).
**Dates:** Covers full-year 2025 revenue data; specifies new game launch months from January to October 2025.
**Tables & Metrics:** Features two structured tables: (1) 2025 Overall Revenue TOP 10 (rank, game name, publisher, annual revenue in 亿元, YoY growth rate); (2) 2025 New Release Revenue TOP 10 (rank, game name, publisher, annual revenue, overall rank, launch date). Key metrics include revenue figures, year-over-year growth/decline percentages, and ranking positions.
**Evidence Types:** Combines quantitative financial/ranking data with qualitative market trend analysis, attributed to 点点数据 (Diandian Data) proprietary research.
**Answerable Questions:** What were the top-grossing mobile games in South Korea in 2025? Which new releases and publishers led the revenue chart? How did MMORPGs perform compared to other genres? What are the exact annual revenue figures and YoY growth rates for top titles? When were the highest-earning new games launched? Which non-Korean/Chinese titles entered the TOP 10? What market trends explain the genre contraction and new-release dominance?
